title: aster ovatus var. yezoensis
intro: Aster ovatus var. yezoensis, also known as Yezo aster, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is often used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin problems. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving gut health, and boosting the immune system. Aster ovatus var. yezoensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower for medicinal purposes.
